data.content: Parent plan finalized. Three-phase implementation: (1) c8f4 adds canonical ArtifactTarget enum with legacy aliases and parser validation, (2) 0d93 refactors prompt rendering to consume runtime-resolved StepMetadata.output instead of profile.outputs directly, (3) 9727 adds regression coverage across parsing, resolution, rendering, and backward compatibility. Dependency order: c8f4 → 0d93 → 9727. All children have plans in ready_for_plan_review except c8f4 which needs one more revision (missing autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom in its sweep list). No browser testing needed — all rendering is server-side Rust.
